hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”；【WORLD】中东紧张局势再次加剧，特朗普警告伊朗“时间紧迫”；【FINANCE】三月份，沃伦·巴菲特向 CNBC 开玩笑说这是一次“小额收购”。伯克希尔的文件可能已经透露了这一点。

items.title: Kevin Warsh comes into the Fed facing a big 'family fight' over cutting interest rates
items.summary: With inflation spiking and Treasury yields surging, Warsh is likely to confront a Federal Open Market Committee in no mood to ease.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”
items.summary_zh: 随着通胀飙升和国债收益率飙升，沃什可能会面对没有心情放松政策的联邦公开市场委员会。

items.title: Trump Warns Iran the ‘Clock Is Ticking’ as Tensions Surge Again in Middle East
items.summary: The president has sought to force Iran to accept his terms on its nuclear program or else face renewed war. An emboldened Iran has rebuffed Trump’s demands.
items.title_zh: 中东紧张局势再次加剧，特朗普警告伊朗“时间紧迫”
items.summary_zh: 总统试图迫使伊朗接受他的核计划条款，否则将面临新的战争。胆大妄为的伊朗拒绝了特朗普的要求。

items.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it
items.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."
items.title_zh: 三月份，沃伦·巴菲特向 CNBC 开玩笑说这是一次“小额收购”。伯克希尔的文件可能已经透露了这一点
items.summary_zh: 三月份，当被问及伯克希尔是否仍在投入资金时，巴菲特表示，该集团已经进行了“一笔小额收购”。

items.title: Death toll from Israeli strikes on Lebanon passes 3,000, officials say
items.summary: It marks a grim milestone in the conflict between Israel and the Lebanese armed group Hezbollah since March, despite a nominal ceasefire.
items.title_zh: 官员称，以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击造成的死亡人数已超过 3000 人
items.summary_zh: 尽管名义上停火，但这标志着以色列和黎巴嫩武装组织真主党自三月以来冲突中的一个严峻里程碑。

items.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.summary: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.
items.title_zh: Sea 对 Codex 代理软件开发未来的看法
items.summary_zh: Sea Limited 的 CPO 解释了该公司为何在工程团队中部署 Codex 以加速亚洲 AI 原生软件的开发。

items.title: Bitwise to add HYPE to balance sheet using fees from Hyperliquid ETF
items.summary: Hyperliquid now regularly beats out Ethereum and Solana in weekly blockchain fee generation, driven largely by perpetual futures.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 将使用 Hyperliquid ETF 的费用将 HYPE 添加到资产负债表中
items.summary_zh: 现在，Hyperliquid 在每周区块链费用生成方面经常击败以太坊和 Solana，这主要是由永续期货推动的。

items.title: How business operations teams use Codex
items.summary: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 业务运营团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解业务运营团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入创建计划简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等。

items.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
items.summary: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely.
items.title_zh: 帮助 ChatGPT 更好地识别敏感对话中的上下文
items.summary_zh: 了解新的 ChatGPT 安全更新如何提高敏感对话中的上下文感知，帮助随着时间的推移检测风险并更安全地做出响应。

items.title: Nvidia earnings call drama: Will Jensen Huang talk 'Trump' and China chips after Xi summit?
items.summary: Both Nvidia's earnings and its commentary on its financial report are expected to be big tests for U.S. equities.

items.summary_zh: 英伟达的盈利及其对财务报告的评论预计将成为美国股市的重大考验。

items.title: One of the market's hottest stock themes is buying everything AI can't replace
items.summary: The search for HALO stocks is a hot theme in the stock market. There is now an ETF to invest in it.
items.title_zh: 市场最热门的股票主题之一是购买人工智能无法取代的一切
items.summary_zh: 寻找HALO股票是股市的热门话题。现在有一个ETF可以投资它。

items.title: Trump v Massie: Could president's Republican nemesis survive $20m attack to oust him?
items.summary: The Kentucky congressman, who has crossed the president on federal spending and the Epstein files, faces Republican voters on Tuesday.

items.summary_zh: 这位肯塔基州国会议员在联邦支出和爱泼斯坦文件问题上与总统发生了冲突，他将于周二面对共和党选民。

items.title: Trump administration unveils $1.7bn fund to compensate his allies as he drops tax lawsuit
items.summary: The settlement will go towards individuals who allege they were subjected to unfair investigations.
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府在放弃税务诉讼后推出 17 亿美元基金来补偿他的盟友
items.summary_zh: 和解协议将针对那些声称自己受到不公平调查的个人。

items.title: Blocked Strait of Hormuz Leads to New Opportunities for Syria
items.summary: The latest war in the Middle East has created new economic opportunities for Syria thanks to its geography.
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡被封锁为叙利亚带来新机遇
items.summary_zh: 由于其地理位置，最近的中东战争为叙利亚创造了新的经济机会。

items.title: He Shut Liquor Stores and Banned Abortion, All for the Glory of Russia
items.summary: A firebrand governor aims to transform his region into a laboratory for the Kremlin’s reactionary ideals.
items.title_zh: 他关闭酒类商店并禁止堕胎，一切都是为了俄罗斯的荣耀
items.summary_zh: 一位煽动性的州长旨在将他的地区变成克里姆林宫反动理想的实验室。

items.title: Minnesotan banks and credit unions set to provide crypto custody August 1
items.summary: Minnesota established the midwest’s first unified digital asset safety net for banks and credit unions.
items.title_zh: 明尼苏达州银行和信用合作社将于 8 月 1 日提供加密货币托管服务
items.summary_zh: 明尼苏达州为银行和信用合作社建立了中西部第一个统一的数字资产安全网。

items.title: Solana is shedding its memecoin reputation as big banks move billions into its ecosystem
items.summary: Wall Street and payment giants are quietly taking over Solana, moving billions onto the network for tokenized funds and global payments even as the broader crypto market cools down, according to a new report by Messari.
items.title_zh: 随着大银行将数十亿美元投入其生态系统，Solana 正在失去其 memecoin 的声誉
items.summary_zh: 根据 Messari 的一份新报告，华尔街和支付巨头正在悄然接管 Solana，将数十亿美元转移到网络上进行代币化基金和全球支付，尽管更广泛的加密货币市场正在降温。

items.title: Mike Novogratz’s Galaxy receives New York BitLicense for institutional crypto push
items.summary: Galaxy Digital became the second company this year to secure a New York BitLicense, following Strike’s approval in March.

items.summary_zh: 继 3 月份 Strike 获得批准后，Galaxy Digital 成为今年第二家获得纽约 BitLicense 的公司。

items.title: Galaxy scores New York BitLicense to offer digital asset services in the state
items.summary: Mike Novogratz' Galaxy Digital said the approval expands its regulatory footprint to more than 50 licenses worldwide.
items.title_zh: Galaxy 获得纽约 BitLicense 以在该州提供数字资产服务
items.summary_zh: Galaxy Digital 的 Mike Novogratz 表示，此次批准将其监管范围扩大到全球 50 多个许可证。

items.summary_zh: Carl Beek 和 Julian Ma 于周一宣布离开以太坊基金会，成为最新公开辞职的员工。

items.title: Kraken co-CEO says exchange revenue, up 3% to $507 million, is a ‘more resilient’ mix amid spending spree

items.title: Revolut wants to take Dogecoin mainstream with its new physical payment card
items.summary: The European fintech giant is launching a physical debit card that lets users spend the popular meme coin anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted with zero extra exchange fees.

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图

items.title: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
items.summary: The meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping last week yielded new pacts, though the sides have provided differing details.

items.title: AI-related layoffs a boost for stocks? Not necessarily
items.summary: The data underscores an uncomfortable reality.
items.title_zh: 与人工智能相关的裁员会提振股市吗？未必
items.summary_zh: 这些数据凸显了一个令人不安的现实。

items.title: Why Taiwan became the defining issue in the Trump-Xi talks
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump had said arms sales to Taiwan would be on the agenda for his talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping which ended Friday.
items.title_zh: 为什么台湾成为特习会谈的决定性问题

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway returns to airlines with $2.6 billion stake in Delta Air Lines
items.summary: The Omaha-based company built a position worth more than $2.6 billion, making Delta Berkshire's 14th-largest holding at the end of March.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司以 26 亿美元持有达美航空股份重返航空公司
items.summary_zh: 截至 3 月底，这家总部位于奥马哈的公司持有价值超过 26 亿美元的头寸，成为达美伯克希尔公司的第 14 大持仓。

items.title: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
items.summary: The US president says he is holding off on a US attack planned for Tuesday as "serious negotiations are now taking place".
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，他应海湾国家的要求取消了新的伊朗袭击
items.summary_zh: 美国总统表示，他将推迟美国计划于周二发动的袭击，因为“目前正在进行认真的谈判”。

items.title: At least 100 dead in Ebola outbreak in DR Congo, official says
items.summary: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared the outbreak an international emergency.

items.summary_zh: 世界卫生组织（WHO）已宣布此次疫情为国际紧急状态。

items.title: Selling children to survive: Afghan fathers forced to make impossible choices
items.summary: In Afghanistan today, a staggering three in four people cannot meet their basic needs.
items.title_zh: 卖儿求生：阿富汗父亲被迫做出不可能的选择
items.summary_zh: 如今，在阿富汗，有四分之三的人无法满足他们的基本需求。

items.title: Two men arrested over stunt at enclosure of famous monkey Punch
items.summary: Two US nationals have been arrested after one jumped the fence of the monkey, who went viral online, police say.
items.title_zh: 两名男子因在著名猴子潘奇的圈地表演特技而被捕
items.summary_zh: 警方称，两名美国公民因跳下这只猴子的栅栏而被捕，这只猴子在网上疯传。

items.title: Shakira wins £50m tax refund from Spanish government

items.summary_zh: 这位哥伦比亚歌手表示，法院的裁决意味着她有罪的“叙述”现在“崩溃”了。

items.title: Four killed in protests during Kenyan strikes over high fuel prices
items.summary: Thousands of commuters are stranded, with key roads in the capital Nairobi largely empty due to the protests over fuel costs.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚因高油价举行罢工抗议，造成四人死亡
items.summary_zh: 由于燃料成本抗议活动，数千名通勤者被困，首都内罗毕的主要道路基本上空无一人。

items.title: Musk loses OpenAI court battle after jury finds he waited too long to sue
items.summary: Jurors spent weeks hearing about Musk's claim that Altman had "stolen a charity."

items.summary_zh: 陪审员们花了数周时间听取马斯克关于奥特曼“窃取了慈善机构”的说法。

items.title: In Closed-Door Talks, U.S. Demands a Major Role in Greenland
items.summary: Greenlandic officials worry about the direction of the negotiations aimed at defusing President Trump’s threats to seize their island. But they have little leverage.

items.summary_zh: 格陵兰官员担心旨在化解特朗普总统夺取格陵兰岛威胁的谈判方向。但他们的影响力微乎其微。

items.title: Trump’s Taiwan Gambit is Already a Gift to China
items.summary: President Trump’s open willingness to hold up a $14 billion Taiwan arms package is a win for Beijing. Now China could be weighing how to keep the weapons on ice for as long as it can.
items.title_zh: 特朗普的台湾策略已经是送给中国的礼物
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统公开愿意推迟价值 140 亿美元的台湾武器计划，这对北京来说是一场胜利。现在，中国可能正在考虑如何尽可能长时间地保存这些武器。

items.title: Ebola Was Identified in Congo Weeks Before W.H.O. Declared an Emergency
items.summary: Early surveillance and testing failed to identify the rare species of Ebola responsible for the current outbreak. An American doctor is among the confirmed cases.

items.summary_zh: 早期监测和测试未能确定导致当前疫情爆发的埃博拉稀有物种。确诊病例中有一名美国医生。

items.title: Millions Recovered in FIFA Corruption Scandal May Now Be Missing Again Before World Cup
items.summary: Ahead of the World Cup, the head of South American soccer faces an ethics complaint he received payments recovered from a 2015 investigation that shook global soccer.

items.title: Soccer Star Kylian Mbappé Faces Off Against France’s Far Right

items.title: Hyperliquid's USDC deal could supercharge HYPE, pressure Circle, Coinbase margins, analysts say
items.summary: The revenue share deal could shift an estimated $160 million in revenue from Coinbase and Circle into Hyperliquid's ecosystem, Compass Point analysts said.

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
